summary: The diff implements most of the required features: Landing Page, Hero Section, Key Features, Footer, Role-Based Login Page, client-side routing, and a Motoko backend stub. The main gap is REQ-8 — the hero background image file itself (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png) is not present in the diff, only the CSS reference to it. The 'Book an Appointment' CTA in HeroSection does not pre-select the Patient role. The backend exposes healthCheck returning Bool rather than a ping returning Text, which satisfies the spirit of REQ-7.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a hero background image served from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png
missing_requirements.reason: The HeroSection references the image URL '/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png' but no image file is present in the diff. The image file itself was not added to frontend/public/assets/generated/.

missing_requirements.requirement: Clicking 'Book an Appointment' navigates to '/login' pre-selecting the Patient role
missing_requirements.reason: In HeroSection.tsx, the 'Book an Appointment' button calls navigate({ to: '/login' }) without passing a role search param, so the Patient role is not pre-selected. The Navbar does pass role:patient but the primary HeroSection CTA does not.

hallucinated_features.description: A fixed top Navbar component with hamburger mobile menu and dual CTA buttons was added.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies a Landing Page with Hero, Key Features, and Footer sections. No top navigation bar was requested as a separate requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Show/hide password toggle and loading spinner state on the Login Page.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-5 only specifies Email and Password fields, role tabs, and a Submit button. The show-password toggle and loading state simulation go beyond what was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Trust indicator badges (HIPAA Compliant, Real-Time Processing, ML-Powered Insights) added to the Hero Section.
hallucinated_features.reason: These UI elements were not requested in REQ-2 or anywhere else in the build request.
